title: pitaviaster haplophyllus
side_effects: Pitaviaster haplophyllus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of Pitaviaster haplophyllus can cause cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. Additionally, improper use of the plant can also lead to liver and kidney damage, making it essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
